description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-radio-group`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-radio-group/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 18 defects — 3 P0, 7 P1, 8 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] 1: Focus ring CSS is dead — keyboard navigation has no visual indicator
- [ ] [P0] 2: Space key does not select the focused radio
- [ ] [P0] 3: Required validation is not initialized on first render

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
